features: „ÄêUpdated Physical Button Design„ÄëThis newly designed drawing board uses a physical button instead of a touch sensor switch. This prevents you from accidentally touching, compared to the touch sensor button, it effectively avoids accidental contact.

Rechargeable A4 Light Table - With built-in 3500mAh lithium battery, the working time after charging is about 4-5 hours, 2 hours per charge (fully charged). You can use this luminous cushion anytime and anywhere, suitable for use in places without power. The A4 light block comes with a C port data cable for easy charging.

8860 lux super bright, 6 levels of brightness continuously adjustable. Lux Maximum Brightness The drawing light box reaches 10286 lux on the surface, which is a great tool for drawing, art supplies, drawing supplies.
